name: research-mcp-server
title: Research MCP Server — 23 Tools for AI Agents
description: 23 research tools for AI agents in one MCP server. Web search, content extraction, Reddit, YouTube, academic papers, citation verification, SEC filings, social media scanning, and more. Works with Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT, LangChain. Pay per call from $0.01.

tool-call-simple.eventTitle: Simple lookup (web_search, extract_content, get_wikipedia, search_news, search_hackernews, score_reliability, resurrect_dead_link)
tool-call-simple.eventDescription: Charged for simple lookup tool calls.

tool-call-standard.eventTitle: Standard search (Reddit, YouTube, Substack, Bluesky, Telegram, Mastodon, VK, OSM, trends, preprints, datasets, SEC filings)
tool-call-standard.eventDescription: Charged for standard search tool calls.

tool-call-premium.eventTitle: Premium workflow (counter-arguments, citation verification, bibliography validation, citation formatting)
tool-call-premium.eventDescription: Charged for premium academic workflow tool calls.
